theme_notes: Drawn from: PSG's bonkers 5-4 Champions League semifinal win over Bayern, nationwide May Day boycotts and school walkouts, gas prices hitting a 4-year high at $4.30/gallon, Devil Wears Prada 2 opening in theaters today, and the Senate voting 47-50 to reject limiting Trump's ability to strike Iran.
settled: Finally balanced. PSG and Bayern scored 9 goals and couldn't manage this.
You're square. Possibly the only settled thing in the news today.
Settled. Meryl Streep returned for a sequel. Miracles are real.
youOwe: You owe less than a gallon of gas. At $4.30, that's almost impressive.
Smaller than North West's EP advance. By a lot, probably.
Less than a Met Gala bathroom attendant's tip. Still: embarrassing.
That's a full tank of gas. Your debt has a commute now.
Devil Wears Prada 2 opened today. Your relationship has a sequel too. Worse reviews.
Senate rejected war powers 47-50. Your partner's patience is down to 48.
Enough gas to drive away and not quite make it.
PSG led 4-0 before the chaos. You were fine once too.
Bigger than a May Day protest sign budget. Smaller than the consequences.
Gas hit a four-year high. So did your debt, apparently.
The Senate voted on limiting consequences. You lost that one too.
Enough for Devil Wears Prada 2 VIP plus a post-screening crisis.
PSG 5-4 Bayern: pure chaos. Your finances are the away team.
The May Day boycott brought people into the streets. This brings your partner to the edge.
Meryl came back for a sequel. You're producing volume three of bad choices.
North West dropped an EP. You dropped a financial crisis. One trends better.
Senate voted 47-50 on Iran. Your partner voted 1-0 on war with you.
That's enough gas at $4.30 to drive somewhere and not come back. Noted.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a gallon of gas. But $4.30 is $4.30.
Less than North West's per-stream royalty. Both numbers are an insult.
Barely enough for Devil Wears Prada 2 popcorn. They're testing you.
That's a full tank of gas. They've been coasting on your fumes.
More than North West charged for the EP. Less than the audacity required.
May Day is about getting what workers are owed. Start here.
Enough gas for a getaway. They're not going anywhere until they pay.
PSG scored 5 goals. You've been scoring patience points. Time to convert.
Meryl Streep got a sequel deal. You got this number. Same energy.
Senate went 47-50. You're owed more than symbolic gestures.
That's Devil Wears Prada 2 tickets for everyone you've complained to about this.
Gas prices hit a four-year high. So did your expectation of being repaid.
PSG's 5-4 win was chaotic. Your financial situation more so.
May Day boycott was about economic justice. This IS economic justice.
War powers failed 47-50. Your invoice needs different arithmetic.
North West's EP probably cost less to produce. Your patience: priceless, depleted.
At $4.30 a gallon, that's 1,100+ gallons. They could've driven into the sea.
Zendaya skipped the Met Gala. Your partner is skipping their entire debt. Lawyer up.
